_meta.purpose: Single source of truth for term schedule data (Summer 2026). Drives pages/support/course-schedule.html via render_course_schedule.py. The companion markdown calendar (IS2053_2026-05-11_Summer_2026_Calendar.md in project knowledge) is the canonical human reference; this JSON mirrors its tables in machine form.

term.name: Summer 2026
term.intro_html: Summer 2026 runs as a 10-week compressed term from Tue May 26 through Tue Aug 4. Each module is 14 days. Modules 1–4 follow the same cadence: two BookEx exercises, two BUILD/ENHANCE labs, and a MASTER lab. Module 5 is compressed to a single BookEx and two labs (BUILD + MASTER), with no Lab 5.3, since Chapter 11 is dropped from the course.

cadence.footer_html: Module exams open Sunday Day 14 and close Tuesday Day 16.

schedule.closingRow_html: Tue Aug 4 — LAST DAY OF TERM — Module 5 Exam closes 11:59 PM

module5Differs.intro_html: Module 5 is the only module that does not run the full BUILD/ENHANCE/MASTER three-lab cadence. The original course design had a Chapter 11 (Inheritance) MASTER lab, but Chapter 11 was dropped from the course. What remains is Chapter 10 (Classes and Objects) split across two labs:
labs_html: Lab 5.1 (BUILD) — You build the City class from scratch and refactor your Module 4 game to use City objects.
Lab 5.2 (MASTER) — You build the Player class against a provided lab-5-2.py, completing the full object-oriented version of the game.
module5Differs.explanation_html: Lab 5.1 keeps the same Friday deadline (Day 5) as every other Lab X.1. Lab 5.2 lands on Wednesday Day 10 (where Lab X.2 would normally land in other modules), with the time that would have been Lab X.3 absorbed into the Module 5 exam window.

termDates.termBoundaries_html: First Day: Tue May 26  ·  Last Day: Tue Aug 4  ·  Final Grades Due: Fri Aug 7
termDates.holidaysFooter_html: Summer is compressed; no holiday accommodations — work ahead if a holiday will affect you.

registrarDeadlines.event_html: Last day to add a class
Drop deadline (last day to drop and receive “W”)

dueTimesCallout.title: All Due Times Are 11:59 p.m. US Central Time
dueTimesCallout.body_html: BookEx and Lab deadlines are 11:59 p.m. US Central Time (the home time zone of UT San Antonio) on their due date, no matter where you are located. Module exams open Sunday and close the following Tuesday at the same 11:59 p.m. US Central Time. Canvas enforces this cutoff automatically, so submit early to be safe.
